ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., join, aggregation, subquery) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the query */,
  "optimization_technique" TEXT /* Optimization technique applied to the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database on which the query was run */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was executed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the query failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query plan */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_text" TEXT /* Text of the query plan */,
  "plan_cost" REAL /* Cost of the query plan */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the query plan */,
  "estimated_rows" INTEGER /* Estimated number of rows the plan will process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_plans_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system performance record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the record belongs to */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during query execution */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during query execution */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O during query execution */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was captured */,
  "network_io" REAL /* Network I/O during query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the result belongs to */,
  "optimization_technique" TEXT /* Optimization technique applied */,
  "execution_time_before" REAL /* Execution time before optimization */,
  "execution_time_after" REAL /* Execution time after optimization */,
  "optimization_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the optimization technique */,
  "improvement_percentage" REAL /* Percentage improvement in execution time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_execution_times" (
  "execution_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query execution time record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the record belongs to */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution time was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_execution_times_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system resource record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the record belongs to */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during query execution */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during query execution */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O during query execution */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource data was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_resources_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query optimization record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the record belongs to */,
  "optimization_technique" TEXT /* Optimization technique applied */,
  "optimization_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the optimization technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_optimization_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of plan (e.g., Nested Loop Join, Hash Aggregate) */,
  "plan_cost" REAL /* Cost of the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_size" (
  "data_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data size record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the record belongs to */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data size (e.g., KB, MB, GB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_size_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
